name: Python Programming
description: Learn Python fundamentals including variables, loops, functions, file handling, and object-oriented programming.

name: Data Structures and Algorithms
description: Understand arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, searching, and sorting algorithms.

name: Machine Learning Fundamentals
description: Learn supervised learning, regression, classification, clustering, and model evaluation.

name: Generative AI and Large Language Models
description: Learn Prompt Engineering, LLMs, Transformers, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and AI application development.

name: Full Stack Web Development
description: Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Flask, APIs, databases, and backend development.

name: SQL and Database Management
description: Learn SQL queries, normalization, joins, indexing, and relational database design.

name: Cloud Computing
description: Learn cloud concepts, AWS services, virtual machines, storage, networking, and deployment.

name: Cyber Security Fundamentals
description: Learn network security, encryption, authentication, ethical hacking, and secure coding.
